mapper.select:
SELECT pp.id, pp.name, pp.user_id, su.name AS user_name, pp.partner_id, rp.name AS partner_name, pp.company_id, rc.name AS company_name, pp.date_start, pp.date, pp.active FROM project_project pp LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON pp.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN res_partner rp ON pp.partner_id = rp.id LEFT JOIN res_company rc ON pp.company_id = rc.id
AND (pp.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND su.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userName}, '%')
AND rp.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.partnerName}, '%')
AND rc.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.companyName}, '%')
ORDER BY pp.id DESC
